description:
You are a radar systems engineer at the Millstone Hill incoherent scatter radar facility. Configure GPredict to track radar calibration spheres. Your operators need pure tabular data in Imperial units to feed into a legacy pointing system.

Perform the following:
1. Delete the default 'Amateur' module to prevent operator confusion.
2. Add a ground station for the Millstone Hill Radar: Name 'Millstone_Hill', Latitude 42.6195 N, Longitude 71.4903 W, Altitude 146 meters.
3. Set Millstone Hill as the default ground station in GPredict's general preferences.
4. Create a new tracking module named 'Radar_Cal' containing these spherical calibration satellites: LCS-1 (NORAD 1314), CALSPHERE 1 (NORAD 900), CALSPHERE 2 (NORAD 902), and SURCAL 159 (NORAD 1313).
5. Change the layout of the 'Radar_Cal' module so it only displays the tabular list (List Only view). You must disable the Map and Polar plot views in the module configuration.
6. Change GPredict's global measurement units to Imperial (miles/feet) in the general preferences, as required by the legacy radar system.

Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
